run.description: PID files, lock files, resolved runtime routing state, and ephemeral process metadata.

logs.description: Structured runtime, governance, infra, and test logs.

reports.description: Machine-consumable summaries, junit, coverage, mutation, and audit reports.

evidence.description: Trace, screenshot, HAR, video, and persisted UI audit evidence.

temp.description: Short-lived temporary files, isolated workdirs, repo-side short-lived execution state, and quarantined local private state.
